message:
fix: dismiss event storm, NaN token guard, watchdog test improvements (#5842)

- Clean pendingRequests on dismiss to prevent WS event storm (#5835)
- Guard token usage against NaN from malformed WS payloads (#5838)
- Improve watchdog tests: use pollBackendHealth directly, add full
  reverse proxy integration test (#5840)

Fixes #5835 #5838 #5840

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
